events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: mechanical seal face contamination from bare-hand touch. Work is staged. The observed field condition is that seal faces have been contaminated by bare-hand touching. This is a defect/hazard. The correct approach is to use lint-free gloves/clean hands, clean seal faces with appropriate solvent, or replace the seal. Bare-hand touch contaminates seal faces with skin oils/salts, which can cause premature seal failure.

Decision: fail (non-compliant, defective condition)
Risk: high (seal failure could lead to leakage)
Work stage: staged
Component conditions: installed-defective (contaminated seal)
Percent complete: 0
Value: 0
Confidence: high
Findings: mechanical seal faces contaminated by bare-hand contact
Actions: clean/replace seal faces, use lint-free gloves, follow OEM handling procedures
Rationale: skin oils/salts contaminate seal faces causing premature failure; must use clean gloves and proper handling
References: SKF/Timken mounting guides

  "findings": [
    "Mechanical seal faces contaminated by bare-hand contact, introducing skin oils, salts, and particulates that compromise face flatness and lubrication film",
    "Improper handling violates OEM cleanliness requirements for precision seal faces"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Do not install contaminated seal; clean faces with lint-free cloth and OEM-approved solvent or replace seal if contamination cannot be fully removed",
    "Use clean, lint-free nitrile or cotton gloves when handling seal faces",
    "Inspect faces with optical flat/lux lamp after cleaning before installation"
  ],
  "rationale": "Bare-hand contact deposits oils and salts on precision lapped seal faces, which can cause localized heat generation, face distortion, blistering, and premature leakage. SKF/Timken mounting guides require clean, gloved handling of bearing and seal running surfaces; the staged seal is therefore non-compliant and must be cleaned or replaced before work proceeds.",
  "references": [
    "SKF bearing mounting guide - cleanliness and handling of precision running surfaces",
    "Timken installation guidelines - contamination control for seals and bearings"
  ]
}
